title: 300 Social Media ChatGPT Prompts | Complete AI Content Creation Pack for Social Media Managers
description:
Content block is real — and it's costing you clients. These 300 done-for-you ChatGPT prompts eliminate blank-page paralysis for every platform and post type.

You get 300 prompts organized by platform (Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, Facebook, Pinterest, Twitter/X), post type, and industry — plus a 30-day content calendar template.

Create a month of content in an afternoon, maintain consistent posting schedules, and deliver better results for clients faster.

Instant delivery after purchase — start posting today.

Files included: PDF prompt pack, 30-day content calendar (printable), platform-specific quick reference card.

Add to cart and never stare at a blank screen again.
category: Craft Supplies & Tools > Patterns & How To > Tutorials & Instructional

pricingStrategy.priceJustification: Competitive pricing targets both freelance social media managers and business owners. 300 prompts plus content calendar template package justifies pricing above single-platform prompt sets. High search volume niche benefits from mid-range impulse buy price.
